title: 7 Ways Saks Global Chose Bankruptcy Over Luxury Retail: Series Finale
description: The Saks-Neiman Marcus merger was built on the premise that combining the two largest American luxury department store chains would give Saks Global  scale advantage.
content: A shopper carries a Saks Fifth Avenue shopping bag in New York, US, on Monday, Jan. 5, 2026. Saks Global Enterprises is looking to line up a loan of as much as $1 billion to keep the business running… [+14192 chars]
